summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. Instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are disabled; all five seed PRs remain open. Three ready PRs require maintainer/technical correctness judgment, one draft docs PR should stay open, one proof-gated PR should stay open pending real behavior proof, and the linked security-sensitive PR is routed only to central security handling.

actions.reason: Focused WebChat/Gateway bug fix appears useful, but merge/technical correctness judgment is explicitly out of scope for this close/comment/label-only inventory job.
Focused channel bug fix appears plausible and proof-backed, but deciding correctness or merge readiness requires maintainer review outside this worker.
Keep open as an independent draft docs PR; close_low_signal is not permitted for this job.
User-facing translation correctness cannot be decided by this inventory worker; keep it for maintainer review.
Keep open pending proof; failing proof blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate treatment but does not justify closeout.
Route only this exact linked security-sensitive ref to central OpenClaw security handling; no close, merge, label, or fix action is planned.
